zerodha.note: FIFO engine ties to broker statement: ₹0.00 variance

angelone.note: Statement scrip-level nets; 7/7 equity names profitable

groww.note: Ledger ↔ order-history reconciliation closes within ₹40; +₹59,234 IPO gain recovered from settlement gap

exhibits.title: Election-week deployment
exhibits.body: ~₹7.5L committed on 6 Jun 2024, two sessions after the election-result drawdown — ICICI, HDFC, JIOFIN, IDBI, Adani Green, Phoenix. Exited through June–July.

exhibits.title: OLA Electric IPO flip
exhibits.body: 2,441 shares allotted at ₹76, sold at ₹100.26. Absent from broker P&L (IPO cost basis); recovered by reconciling a ₹1.85L settlement-ledger gap.

exhibits.title: Research with capital committed
exhibits.body: Initiated independent coverage on Triveni Turbine; bought 284 sh at ₹703.79. Marked −26% by May 2025; averaged 10 sh at ₹539 into the drawdown; exited all 294 at ₹709.90 in May 2026, three dividends collected.

pending: Combined money-weighted return (XIRR) — external cash-flow set assembled from all three broker ledgers (118 flows, ledgers conserve to the paisa); withheld pending a CDSL/demat transfer statement to resolve inter-account in-kind movements before a single capital base can be struck
resolved: OLA Electric (Groww) — the 2,441-sh ‘pledged’ position was an intraday round-trip (buy ₹100.25 → sell ₹100.26, 01-Oct-2024); Groww’s stock P&L shows every share round-tripped. Closed, +₹3,509.29 (already in the record). No pledged holding exists; its mark is no longer pending.

LODHA (Zerodha) — the 26-sh ‘not covered’ disposal is now covered by the Zerodha Console P&L (full period): fully closed, 52 sh, realised +₹4,888.50 (+6.57%), unrealised ₹0. ₹3,993.50 sits in the dated cadence; the +₹895.00 tail is statement-confirmed (amount exact; export does not date the tail lots, so disclosed rather than placed in a cadence month).
